ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "imdb_title_id" TEXT /* IMDB title identifier */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date when the film was published */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the film in minutes */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the film */,
  "avg_vote" REAL /* Average vote received from users */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the film */,
  "usa_gross_income" TEXT /* Gross income in the USA */,
  "worldwide_gross_income" TEXT /* Worldwide gross income */,
  "metascore" INTEGER /* Metascore of the film */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or slogan of the film */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the film's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the film's poster */,
  "is_color" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film is in color */,
  "aspect_ratio" TEXT /* Aspect ratio of the film */,
  "sound_mix" TEXT /* Sound mix used in the film */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification or rating of the film */,
  "awards_won" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the film */,
  "awards_nominated" INTEGER /* Number of awards the film was nominated for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* List of notable films directed by the director */,
  "awards_won" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the director */,
  "awards_nominated" INTEGER /* Number of awards the director was nominated for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* List of notable films the actor has appeared in */,
  "awards_won" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the actor */,
  "awards_nominated" INTEGER /* Number of awards the actor was nominated for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_actors" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the film */,
  "billing_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the actor is credited in the film */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user recommends the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, analyst, executive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "critics_reviews" (
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each critic review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "critic_name" TEXT /* Name of the critic */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the critic */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the critic recommends the film */,
  "critic_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the critic */,
  "critic_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the critic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("critic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_critics_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "genre_id")
)
